flagged_setups.thesis: Post-earnings momentum setup if AIP commercial clears $771M (+94% YoY). New logo acceleration and US govt. AI contracts are secondary confirms. Entry on open May 5 if report beats and guidance raised. Binary risk: HSBC downgraded pre-earnings; options at ±10.06%.

Post-earnings momentum if Q1 Rev clears $9.8B guide and gross margin holds ~55%. EPYC Genoa server share + Instinct MI350 data points key. Cathie Wood selling $79.9M pre-earnings is a caution; only enter on beat+raise. Stock +68% YTD so bar is high.

Hormuz deadlock entering week 2 with no diplomatic breakthrough over weekend. Iran refuses nuclear concessions; Trump maintains blockade. IEA 'largest supply disruption in history.' Structural support above $108 while strait stays shut. Any peace breakthrough is sharp reversal risk.
